title: DESNZ: senior officials’ business expenses and hospitality, October to December 2024
body: "The Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) publishes details of the Permanent Secretary, Directors General, Finance Directors, Commercial Directors and Directors who are senior responsible owners in the Government’s Major Projects Portfolio meetings with external individuals and organisations, and senior officials’ business expenses and hospitality every quarter.  This data is also available on data.gov.uk:   DESNZ: senior officials business expenses, hospitality and meetings   "
